creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: swills@ didn't last long, and attachment 163129 had more issues (e.g. patch-bug1026499 rebase, junk in nspr diff, jemalloc vs. mozjemalloc)... Sorry, the current state of gecko ports is too sad before one can offer a proper review. And I can't refactor it into more pleasing shape as Q/A on my >7 years old hardware would be a torture.
